name: Lemon Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 package Cookies, Pepperidge Farm Lemon Crunch - finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crushed cookies with melted butter. Pat into bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Refrigerate.
2. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
3. Beat yolks in another bowl until thick and lemon-colored. Stir in lemon juice and peel.
4. Gently fold egg whites into the yolk mixture. Fold in whipped cream.
5. Pour filling into crust and freeze.
6. Puree thawed frozen raspberries. Pour through a strainer into a serving bowl.
7. Let torte stand at room temperature for 10 minutes. Remove springform pan.
8. Slice and serve with raspberry sauce.
